_comment: Time-Event: Caravan Disappearance. Per time directive: the world is not static. Trigger: random, scope: regional, duration: 1 days. Prime Directive: event occurs objectively; player perception determines whether they witness it.
name: Caravan Disappearance
note: Caravans disappear; causes vary (bandits, beasts, void fissures).

simulation_notes.world_breathes: The world changes whether or not the player acts; a player who returns 200 years later will barely recognize it.

perception_tiers.foundation_establishment: Perceives the event's scope and effects.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Perceives the event's place in the larger pattern.
